Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher LeClerc, Esq. and Mark LeClerc, Esq. 415-445-0900 of LeClerc LeClerc LLP() for Plaintiff.
Vincent Adams, Esq. 415-490-9000 of Fisher Philips for Defendant LIGHT LABS INC.

RULING - ARGUED. Hearing is held. The Court hands out copies of the tentative ruling and passes the case. 10:02 The matter is recalled. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LIGHT LABS INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of Arbitration.

Taken Under Submission.***(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

***After the hearing, an Order granting motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is signed/filed. (see scanned order for details)***
